project: Black Data Lab - Edward P. Jones Literary Analysis

coverage.missing_1970_black: Black-specific attainment not available at tract level in 1970 Census

total.1980: 1980 Census - NT48B (DHN) aggregated from race categories
total.1990: 1990 Census - NP58 (E34) aggregated from race categories
total.2000: 2000 Census - NP148C (GRW) aggregated from race categories

black.1960: 1960 Census - NT31 (B8S) Nonwhite (proxy - DC Nonwhite population was 98% Black)

methodological_notes: All categories standardized to 4-level schema for cross-decade comparison
1970 Black attainment data unavailable at tract level - gap acknowledged
1960 Black attainment approximated using Nonwhite population (valid for DC)
ACS 2010 and 2020 data are 5-year estimates, not single-year census counts
All counts are unweighted NHGIS estimates
recommended_use: For longitudinal analysis of educational attainment patterns in DC neighborhoods, with caution for 1960-1970-1980 break in Black population measurement
